scripts.build: npm run build -w @capsule/shared-types && npm run build -w @capsule/sdk-typescript && npm run build -w @capsule/marketplace-api && npm run build -w @capsule/disclosure-host && npm run build -w @capsule/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n marketplace,host,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @capsule/marketplace-api" "npm run dev -w @capsule/disclosure-host" "npm run dev -w @capsule/frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @capsule/sdk-typescript && npm run test -w @capsule/proof-engine-rust
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.wasm:node: cd packages/proof-engine-rust && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node
scripts.wasm:web: cd packages/proof-engine-rust && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web
